mapper.select:
SELECT et.id AS evalTypeId, et.name AS evalTypeName, etm.evaluator_no AS evaluatorNo, eval_emp.name AS evaluatorName, etm.evaluatee_no AS evaluateeNo, e.name AS evaluateeName, et.name AS evalName, etm.step, e.dept_id AS deptId, d.name AS deptName, e.position AS position, ISNULL(lv.name, '-') AS levelName, ISNULL(eval_lv.name, '-') AS evaluatorLevelName, et.start_date AS startDate, et.end_date AS endDate, REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(cc.name, '평가 전', '평가전'), '평가 중', '평가중'), '평가 완료', '평가완료') AS statusName
FROM eval_target_mapping_52 etm
JOIN eval_type_52 et ON et.id = etm.eval_type_id
JOIN employee_52 e ON e.emp_no = etm.evaluatee_no
LEFT JOIN department_52 d ON d.id = e.dept_id
LEFT JOIN employee_52 eval_emp ON eval_emp.emp_no = etm.evaluator_no
LEFT JOIN code_common_52 lv ON e.level_id = lv.id AND lv.group_id = 1 LEFT JOIN code_common_52 eval_lv ON eval_emp.level_id = eval_lv.id AND eval_lv.group_id = 1
LEFT JOIN code_common_52 cc ON cc.code = CAST(etm.status AS CHAR) AND cc.group_id = 3
LEFT JOIN code_group_52 cg ON cg.id = cc.group_id
et.name LIKE '%다면평가%' AND cg.group_code = 'EVAL_STATUS' AND (eval_emp.level_id IS NULL OR eval_emp.level_id != 6) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM final_result_52 fr WHERE fr.emp_no = etm.evaluatee_no AND fr.year = et.year AND fr.status = 0 )
AND et.year = #{year}
AND MONTH(et.start_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 12 AND MONTH(et.end_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 12
AND MONTH(et.start_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 6 AND MONTH(et.end_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 6
AND MONTH(et.start_date) BETWEEN 7 AND 12 AND MONTH(et.end_date) BETWEEN 7 AND 12
ORDER BY eval_emp.level_id DESC, etm.evaluator_no ASC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT et.id AS evalTypeId, et.name AS evalTypeName, etm.evaluator_no AS evaluatorNo, eval_emp.name AS evaluatorName, etm.evaluatee_no AS evaluateeNo, e.name AS evaluateeName, etm.step, e.dept_id AS deptId, d.name AS deptName, e.position AS position, ISNULL(lv.name, '-') AS levelName, ISNULL(eval_lv.name, '-') AS evaluatorLevelName, et.start_date AS startDate, et.end_date AS endDate, REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(cc.name, '평가 전', '평가전'), '평가 중', '평가중'), '평가 완료', '평가완료') AS statusName
FROM eval_target_mapping_52 etm
JOIN eval_type_52 et ON et.id = etm.eval_type_id
JOIN employee_52 e ON e.emp_no = etm.evaluatee_no
LEFT JOIN department_52 d ON d.id = e.dept_id
LEFT JOIN employee_52 eval_emp ON eval_emp.emp_no = etm.evaluator_no
LEFT JOIN code_common_52 lv ON e.level_id = lv.id AND lv.group_id = 1 LEFT JOIN code_common_52 eval_lv ON eval_emp.level_id = eval_lv.id AND eval_lv.group_id = 1
LEFT JOIN code_common_52 cc ON cc.code = CAST(etm.status AS CHAR) AND cc.group_id = 3
LEFT JOIN code_group_52 cg ON cg.id = cc.group_id
et.name LIKE '%다면%' AND cg.group_code = 'EVAL_STATUS' AND (eval_emp.level_id IS NULL OR eval_emp.level_id != 6) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM final_result_52 fr WHERE fr.emp_no = etm.evaluatee_no AND fr.year = et.year AND fr.status = 1 )
AND et.year = #{year}
AND MONTH(et.start_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 12 AND MONTH(et.end_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 12
AND MONTH(et.start_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 6 AND MONTH(et.end_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 6
AND MONTH(et.start_date) BETWEEN 7 AND 12 AND MONTH(et.end_date) BETWEEN 7 AND 12
ORDER BY et.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM eval_target_mapping_52 etm JOIN eval_type_52 et ON et.id = etm.eval_type_id JOIN employee_52 e ON e.emp_no = etm.evaluatee_no LEFT JOIN employee_52 eval_emp ON eval_emp.emp_no = etm.evaluator_no LEFT JOIN code_common_52 cc ON cc.code = CAST(etm.status AS CHAR) LEFT JOIN code_group_52 cg ON cg.id = cc.group_id
et.name LIKE '%다면%' AND cg.group_code = 'EVAL_STATUS' AND (eval_emp.level_id IS NULL OR eval_emp.level_id != 6) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM final_result_52 fr WHERE fr.emp_no = etm.evaluatee_no AND fr.year = et.year AND fr.status = 0 )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM eval_target_mapping_52 etm JOIN eval_type_52 et ON et.id = etm.eval_type_id JOIN employee_52 e ON e.emp_no = etm.evaluatee_no LEFT JOIN employee_52 eval_emp ON eval_emp.emp_no = etm.evaluator_no LEFT JOIN code_common_52 cc ON cc.code = CAST(etm.status AS CHAR) LEFT JOIN code_group_52 cg ON cg.id = cc.group_id
et.name LIKE '%다면%' AND cg.group_code = 'EVAL_STATUS' AND (eval_emp.level_id IS NULL OR eval_emp.level_id != 6) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM final_result_52 fr WHERE fr.emp_no = etm.evaluatee_no AND fr.year = et.year AND fr.status = 1 )

SELECT et.id AS evalTypeId, et.name AS evalTypeName, etm.evaluator_no AS evaluatorNo, eval_emp.name AS evaluatorName, etm.evaluatee_no AS evaluateeNo, e.name AS evaluateeName, etm.step, e.dept_id AS deptId, d.name AS deptName, e.position AS position, et.start_date AS startDate, et.end_date AS endDate, cc.name AS statusName FROM eval_target_mapping_52 etm
JOIN eval_type_52 et ON et.id = etm.eval_type_id
JOIN employee_52 e ON e.emp_no = etm.evaluatee_no
LEFT JOIN department_52 d ON d.id = e.dept_id LEFT JOIN employee_52 eval_emp ON eval_emp.emp_no = etm.evaluator_no LEFT JOIN code_common_52 cc ON cc.code = CAST(etm.status AS VARCHAR) LEFT JOIN code_group_52 cg ON cg.id = cc.group_id AND cg.group_code = 'EVAL_STATUS'
et.name LIKE '%다면%' AND cg.group_code = 'EVAL_STATUS' AND (eval_emp.level_id IS NULL OR eval_emp.level_id != 6) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 0 FROM final_result_52 fr WHERE fr.emp_no = etm.evaluatee_no AND fr.year = et.year AND fr.status = 0 )
AND etm.evaluator_no = #{userNo}
AND etm.evaluatee_no = #{userNo}
AND et.year = #{year}
AND MONTH(et.start_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 12 AND MONTH(et.end_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 12
AND MONTH(et.start_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 6 AND MONTH(et.end_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 6
AND MONTH(et.start_date) BETWEEN 7 AND 12 AND MONTH(et.end_date) BETWEEN 7 AND 12
ORDER BY et.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT TOP 1 et.id AS evalTypeId, et.name AS evalTypeName, etm.evaluator_no AS evaluatorNo, eval_emp.name AS evaluatorName, etm.evaluatee_no AS evaluateeNo, e.name AS evaluateeName, e.position AS position, ISNULL(lv.name, '-') AS levelName, e.dept_id AS deptId, d.name AS deptName, et.start_date AS startDate, et.end_date AS endDate, REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(cc.name, '평가 전', '평가전'), '평가 중', '평가중'), '평가 완료', '평가완료') AS statusName FROM eval_target_mapping_52 etm JOIN eval_type_52 et ON et.id = etm.eval_type_id JOIN employee_52 e ON e.emp_no = etm.evaluatee_no LEFT JOIN employee_52 eval_emp ON eval_emp.emp_no = etm.evaluator_no LEFT JOIN department_52 d ON d.id = e.dept_id LEFT JOIN code_common_52 lv ON e.level_id = lv.id AND lv.group_id = 1 LEFT JOIN code_common_52 cc ON cc.group_id = 3 AND cc.code = CAST(etm.status AS VARCHAR) WHERE etm.eval_type_id = #{evalTypeId} AND etm.evaluatee_no = #{evaluateeNo} AND etm.evaluator_no = #{evaluatorNo}
SELECT DISTINCT year FROM eval_type_52 ORDER BY year DESC

SELECT q.id AS questionId, q.category AS categoryName, q.question AS question, q.weight AS weight, a.score AS score, a.content AS content, a.mapping_id AS mappingId FROM eval_answer_52 a JOIN eval_question_52 q ON a.question_id = q.id JOIN eval_target_mapping_52 m ON a.mapping_id = m.id WHERE m.evaluatee_no = #{evaluateeNo} AND m.eval_type_id = #{evalTypeId}

SELECT q.category AS categoryName, SUM(a.score) AS totalScore, COUNT(DISTINCT m.evaluator_no) AS evaluatorCount FROM eval_answer_52 a JOIN eval_question_52 q ON a.question_id = q.id JOIN eval_target_mapping_52 m ON a.mapping_id = m.id WHERE m.evaluatee_no = #{evaluateeNo} AND m.eval_type_id = #{evalTypeId} GROUP BY q.category ORDER BY q.category
SELECT category_name AS categoryName, avg_score AS avgScore FROM eval_category_summary_52 WHERE evaluatee_no = #{evaluateeNo} AND eval_type_id = #{evalTypeId} ORDER BY category_name
SELECT category_name AS categoryName, SUM(avg_score) / COUNT(*) AS avgScore FROM eval_category_summary_52 WHERE eval_type_id = #{evalTypeId} GROUP BY category_name
